location: Starting weapon of the Bandit class; also a rare drop from small Demi-Humans, most efficiently farmed from a group of four hidden among sheep just north of the Craftsman's Shack Site of Grace on Mt. Gelmir.
tactics: If not playing Bandit, farm the four Demi-Humans hidden among sheep just north of Craftsman's Shack — a fast, repeatable rest-and-kill loop.
A single Demi-Human also drops it in Lakeside Crystal Cave (Liurnia), tucked in a bush near the dungeon entrance, if you're passing through earlier instead.
Its very high Dexterity scaling (C, near S-tier with Keen) makes it worth grabbing even outside a Bandit playthrough.
lore: A broad, curved knife built for slashing rather than stabbing, meant to open wounds that keep bleeding rather than land one clean puncture.

builds.name: Pure Dex bleed
builds.why: C-tier native Dexterity scaling (near S with Keen) plus 38 innate bleed buildup make it one of the best low-investment pure-dex bleed daggers in the game.

builds.name: Bandit starting-class carry weapon
builds.why: Usable from level 5 as the Bandit's default weapon, and pairing it with early Arcane investment boosts its bleed buildup further.
